message:
feat(sqlite): expose query_sync and execute_sync as public methods

Make the synchronous query/execute helpers publicly accessible for
simpler use cases that don't require async:

- query_sync(): Execute SELECT queries, returns Vec<Row>
- execute_sync(): Execute INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, returns affected rows

Changes:
- Changed visibility from fn (private) to pub fn (public)
- Enhanced doc comments to clarify these are blocking operations
- Added guidance to use Connection trait methods for async usage

This enables direct synchronous database access for scripts, tests,
and simple applications that don't need the async machinery, while
maintaining the async Connection trait as the primary interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
